name: HERM & HE Academic Management Landscape Scanner

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO market_signals (project_id, signal_type, title, summary, source_url, region, relevance_score)
SELECT p.id, $1, $2, $3, $4, 'UK', (4 - LEAST($5::int, 3))
FROM projects p WHERE p.slug = 'sjms'
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM market_signals m WHERE m.title = $2 AND m.signal_type = $1)
RETURNING id;
